_notes: Calibrated on a CODE corpus (PD-1 v2, evidence-branch experiment/pd1-v2-calibration-2026-05-26). Negatives = gate-PASS NPU+GPU outputs from a 15-task code battery. Positives = deterministic synthetic degeneration (loop_body / sentence_repeat / truncate_comments / trigram_explosion) seeded from those negatives. Replaces the prose calibration that over-tripped trigram_repeat on correct code drafts (see docs/FINDINGS-pd1-v1-runtime-verification.md).
